purpose: Formalize task-shape evaluation and recommended execution modes.

dimensions.complexity: number of moving parts or transformations
dimensions.surface_breadth: number of ownership surfaces or packages affected

cheap_direct.trigger: low complexity, low ambiguity, narrow validation
cheap_direct.recommendation: Use cheapest safe path; avoid execplans.

medium_reasoning.trigger: coherent pass but requires moderate interpretation
medium_reasoning.recommendation: Spend moderate reasoning; do not promote unless ambiguity grows.

planned_execution.trigger: high ambiguity, breadth, or validation burden
planned_execution.recommendation: Promote to execplan; write contract before implementation.

autopilot_milestone.recommendation: Execute one bounded milestone; keep plan current.

escalate_and_stop.trigger: unsafe continuation, unknown validation, or blocked path
escalate_and_stop.recommendation: Stop; record blocker; escalate to stronger planner or human.

initiative_rules.local_optimization: allowed inside stated outcome and constraints
initiative_rules.scope_expansion: requires blocked path or safety violation
